basics.name: Oputa Lawrence
basics.label: Software & AI Engineer
basics.summary: Software and AI Engineer based in Asaba, Delta State, with a drive for building products that matter. Founder of Lawjun Labs, focusing on shipping intelligent, high-impact solutions.

work.name: Lawjun Labs
work.summary: Architecting and shipping AI-driven products like Snoopa and Habibee. Overseeing entire product lifecycle from conceptualization to deployment of scalable mobile and web solutions using React Native, TypeScript, and Convex.

work.name: Yan Kontent Factory
work.summary: Creative intern during NYSC. Built Yanhub, a custom web application to track and manage video project status from shooting to final delivery.

work.name: Nexainnova
work.summary: Built and shipped production-ready applications using PHP and modern web frameworks to deliver robust backend solutions.

work.name: Coriftech Solutions
work.summary: Intensive internship mastering PHP development and gaining first leadership experience tutoring students on programming basics.

projects.name: Snoopa
projects.description: A conversational AI agent that tracks the topics you care about across the web 24/7.

projects.name: Habibee
projects.description: Build atomic habits, track streaks with beautiful activity grids, and stay accountable.

projects.name: Igle
projects.description: The all-in-one app for reliable rides and swift package deliveries.

projects.description: A vibrant blog platform dedicated to sharing and celebrating Nigerian content.
